**Fixes applied (commit d3e1844):**

**Missing fetch timeouts — clunger/src/index.ts:**
- `notifySpriteTie`: 3 fire-and-forget inject calls had no timeout (could hang indefinitely if omni-gateway was slow)
- `notifyVoteWinner`: same
- `handleInject` retry loop: the omni fetch had no per-attempt timeout (retries could each hang forever)
- `handleTemporalProxy` and `handleLabsProxy`: pass-through proxy fetches had no timeout (30s added — reason...(truncated)
